title: Premium Catering Foil | Professional Cooking & Home Kitchen Use | Cooking | Baking | Roasting | Freezing | Wrapping | Storage | Extra Long |300mm x 75m | Single Roll
features: Professional & Home Kitchen Use: A superb quality extra long 75-meter foil roll offering all you need for all types of your cooking, roasting, baking, general kitchen and storage needs – Premium quality Foil with absolute great value.

You can count on its Reliability & Durability: Our Premium Foil is a must have for every kitchen as it’s crafted with premium grade thickness material. Does not tear or puncture easily unlike many others – perfect for securely wrapping & protecting various types of foods.

Hassle free enjoyable cooking: Offers protection & leak proof seal by locking moisture & flavour – an absolute choice for grilling, roasting, baking, fridge or freezer storage and all other such needs of a professional & busy kitchen at work or home. Enjoy your cooking with ease & hassle free, without having to worry about making mess, leakage & spills.
Long Length Foil: A massive 75m length x 300mm wide, ample length for wrapping almost anything for your kitchen needs whether it’s for home kitchen or busy professional catering kitchens.
Suitable for Various Temperatures: Can be safely used in ovens (within recommended temperatures) and on grills (indirect heat), as well as for cold storage.
